message:
Ensure .env exists before running cf-typegen

Add a pre-check to the cf-typegen script to copy .env.example to .env if .env doesn't exist. This prevents issues in CI/CD environments where the .env file may not be present.

files.patch:
@@ -8,7 +8,7 @@
     "preview": "vite preview",
     "predeploy": "bun run cf-typegen && bun run build",
     "deploy": "wrangler deploy",
-    "cf-typegen": "wrangler types",
+    "cf-typegen": "test -f .env || cp .env.example .env; wrangler types",
     "db:setup": "bun run db:generate && bun run db:migrate:local",
     "db:generate": "drizzle-kit generate",
     "db:migrate:local": "wrangler d1 migrations apply vibeinsights --local",
